programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: ARISE Kids TV is jam packed full of faith and fun delivered by your favourite friends! Arise Kids TV believes in the next generation aims to inspire, connect and empower kids to follow Jesus and love life.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: Harald Bluetooth - The Viking and The Wireless Revolution
programme.desc: What does a Viking and wireless technology have in common?- Unity. In this episode we discover the man who inspired the name of Bluetooth technology and how he connected his nation.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Donut holes and chili bowls are the star of the show when Mike takes a trip to the nation's capital; Mike talks about DC's secret passageways and ends up finding some of his own in a spooky mansion.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: To cope with the pain of abandonment, people often develop maladaptive behaviours. Emily Morrish tragically lost her mum to Breast Cancer when she was 13. Learning to break out from abandonment was a difficult journey.

programme.title: Woodlawn
programme.desc: It's 1973, and a high school footballer in a newly desegregated school battles racial tensions on and off the field.

programme.title: Lucky's Treasure
programme.desc: When a young woman discovers that her grandmother died while searching for a hidden treasure, she sets out to find the gold. A story about family, faith, love, tradition, and keeping a grandmother's dream alive.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: Exploring answers to life's most difficult questions and recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with students and professors, to give real answers to tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: Love at First Bark
programme.desc: Portland interior designer Julia Galvins adopts a dog and seeks the help of expert and handsome dog trainer Owen Michaels.

programme.title: The Good Road
programme.desc: We learn about the critical role of Space Force at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: Travis attempts to unmask the politician protecting CMI. The DNA test results arrive.

programme.title: I Am Second
programme.desc: A jailed father (Duche Bradley) finds grace in a most unexpected place. And a young woman (Victoria Childress) breaks away from self-harm to set a new course in life.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: No matter how long we've been a Christian, each of us has more to learn about the God we love and serve.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Bernie The Dolphin
programme.desc: Bernie the Dolphin is a family adventure about a brother and sister in St Augustine, Florida, who befriend a badly sunburned dolphin separated from his family and uncover a secret plan.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Adventures of Dally & Spanky
programme.desc: A girl inherits a miniature horse that develops an unlikely friendship with her half-sister's Jack Russell Terrier, which takes to riding on the horse's back.

programme.title: A New Year's Resolution
programme.desc: When a morning show producer makes a New Year's resolution to say yes more, she crosses paths with a confirmed Yes man who just might hold the key to her biggest story and to her heart.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.sub-title: Leading to Success in a Changing World
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: Seeds of Yesterday
programme.desc: The saga of the tormented Dollangangers comes to an end where the family continues to coexist miserably.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Dark Angel
programme.desc: In her grandmother's fine, rich, Boston house, Heaven Casteel dreams of a wonderful new life of new friends, the best schools, clothes, and love.

programme.title: I'll Be Watching
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping the clutches of a deadly stalker, a beautiful young woman flees to a remote town, where she rebuilds her life and finds the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher 10 years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad.

programme.title: My Child has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that his biological father is actually her fertility doctor, she teams up with another one of the doctor's clients to bring him to justice.

programme.title: A Dangerous Affair
programme.desc: Amelie begins a steamy affair with Pierce, but the duo soon find themselves dangerously intertwined after Amelie comes face-to-face with a masked woman following a murder.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange as his fascination with her turns into obsession.

programme.title: The Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: After struggling through a painful divorce, April decides to get back into the dating game and is swept off her feet by the handsome Jacob, who is hiding a dark side and a wife.

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: However, her world soon comes crashing down when a woman shows up at her doorstep claiming she's married to Leo.

programme.title: Husband, Father, Killer
programme.desc: As a teen, Alyssa has a relationship with abusive Steven, but their path takes a dark turn after she has his child and gives her up for adoption.

programme.title: Amish Stud: The Eli Weaver Story
programme.desc: A man who calls himself Amish Stud plots with his mistress to murder his wife, to the horror of his conservative Amish community.

programme.title: Holiday In Santa Fe
programme.desc: Siblings Tony and Magdalena help run a family-owned holiday ornament making and decor business in Santa Fe, but when matriarch Milagro passes, the family struggles to find its heart.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Web of Dreams
programme.desc: Heaven's mother Leigh had to escape from Farthinggale Manor and the secrets she harboured. Falling into the arms of Luke Casteel Sr, his devotion promised her hope as only Luke knew her secrets.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Heaven
programme.desc: Of all the poor people living in 'the willies', the foothills of the mountains of West Virginia, the Casteels were considered lowest.

programme.title: I Was Lorena Bobbitt
programme.desc: The story of a severely abused young woman whose torment, both physical and mental, at the hands of her husband pushed her over the edge.

programme.title: An Amish Murder
programme.desc: A woman returns to the Amish farming community of her youth, but her peace is shattered when a murder investigation exposes a dark secret that could destroy her.

programme.title: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: Having thwarted the Germans at Bastogne, the exhausted Easy Company must now take the nearby town of Foy from the enemy.

programme.title: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: Easy Company arrives in the Alsatian town of Haguenau near the German border, and is ordered to send a patrol across the river to take enemy prisoners.

programme.title: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: Easy Company finally enters Germany to surprisingly little resistance, and has a chance to relax for the first time in months.

programme.title: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: Winters leads Easy Company into the Bavarian town of Berchtesgaden, he receives orders to take the abandoned 'Eagle's Nest', Hitler's breathtaking mountaintop fortress.

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The attack on Pearl Harbor leads Robert Leckie and John Basilone into combat, while Eugene Sledge says goodbye to pal Sid Phillips.

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The 1st and 7th Marines endure jungle hardships and a Japanese barrage in an attempt to retake a lost airfield in Guadalcanal.

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: On leave in Melbourne, Leckie finds romance, while Basilone receives a Medal of Honour.

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: As Sledge trains for combat in the US, Leckie and the 1st Marines combat the enemy and the elements in the jungles of New Britain.

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: While Basilone reluctantly plays the war hero at home, Sledge gets his first taste of combat on the island of Peleliu.

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sledge and Leckie battle oppressive heat and lack of water as the 1st Marines continue their assault on the Peleliu airfield.

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: The Marines secure their objective at the Battle of Peleliu, though not without great cost. Sledge veers to the edge of moral collapse.

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Basilone returns to Camp Pendleton, where he courts fellow Marine Lena Riggi before shipping out to Iwo Jima.

programme.title: The Pacific
programme.desc: Sledge and the 1st Marines relieve an embattled Army division in Okinawa, straining bodies and minds.

programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: When we see God's holiness, it makes us long for the day when we will be like Him. Until then, we strive to cultivate holiness in our lives.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Walking In Faith/The Companion of Faith
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part one of Aiming to Please God, Pastor Bayless shares the main ingredient you need to live a life that puts a smile on God's face and opens you up to a channel of His blessings.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: If you want to thrive, you don't get it by hiding in the shadows, you have to step and give and God will give it back to you in abundance.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: The War for Man's Soul - Part 1
programme.desc: Can you resist the temptation to do wrong when it presents itself? Discover how choosing God's path over a wrong temptation transforms your soul and brings you closer to God's peace.

programme.title: The Fatherless Epidemic
programme.desc: A short documentary addressing one of the most pressing issue in Western society - The Fatherless Epidemic. While everyone attempts to solve societal ills by treating symptoms, the church is being called to fight the issue at its roots.

programme.title: The Mulligan
programme.desc: Paul McAllister seems to have it all, but his life starts to fall apart. Guided by the wisdom and advice of an old golf pro, Paul learns about playing a good game both on and off the course.

programme.title: Love at First Bark
programme.desc: Portland interior designer Julia Galvins adopts a dog and seeks the help of expert and handsome dog trainer Owen Michaels.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Faith Runs Deep
programme.desc: In this new program from the producers of the award-winning series, Jesus the Game Changer, host Karl Faase travels around Australia in an iconic Holden ute, discovering a rich and inspiring history of faith.

programme.title: An Interview with God
programme.desc: An up-and-coming journalist finds his world and faith increasingly challenged when he's granted the interview of a lifetime - with someone who claims to be God.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that explores the complexities of poverty and challenges viewers to think about what it means to be a 'good neighbour.'.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part one of Aiming to Please God, Pastor Bayless shares the main ingredient you need to live a life that puts a smile on God's face and opens you up to a channel of His blessings.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: The War for Man's Soul - Part 2
programme.desc: Have you ever considered who you are "in Christ"? Today, explore the power of living as a child of God, where your identity brings you peace, purpose, and strength.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: An Interview with God
programme.desc: An up-and-coming journalist finds his world and faith increasingly challenged when he's granted the interview of a lifetime - with someone who claims to be God.

programme.title: It Takes a Child
programme.desc: A former sponsor child explores a village in Samar, Philippines that has been impacted by child sponsorship. For many families here, poverty has ripped away their options; but Compassion sponsorship is showing a way out.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: Bernie the Dolphin 2
programme.desc: The kids are thrilled that Bernie has come back. But so has their old enemy Winston, who's about to kidnap the talented dolphin. Kevin and Holly must rescue their splashy friend before it's too late.

programme.title: Beyond the Fire: Resilience
programme.desc: This program takes an honest look at the frustrations and triumphs on the road to recovery three years after the Black Summer bushfire crisis.

programme.title: An Amish Murder
programme.desc: A woman returns to the Amish farming community of her youth, but her peace is shattered when a murder investigation exposes a dark secret that could destroy her.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Pearl In The Mist
programme.desc: Fate whisked Ruby from a simple life in the Louisiana bayou. But her new riches bring more treachery than happiness.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' All That Glitters
programme.desc: Driven from the Dumas mansion back to her beloved bayou, Ruby is determined to make a secure and happy home for her precious infant daughter, Pearl.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: The Bear Lake Murders
programme.desc: A sheriff teams up with a detective to uncover the truth behind a series of annual deaths in a resort town. Their investigation leads them to believe that a killer is preying on holidaymakers.

programme.title: Murder at the Country Club
programme.desc: An assistant manager finds her life in danger when she uncovers corrupt activities at a prestigious country club.

programme.title: Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: Grisly serial killer Keith Hunter Jesperson taunts authorities with scribbled confessions bearing a smiley face at the scenes of his crimes. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Revenge For My Mother
programme.desc: Audrey teaches postnatal fitness to a group of mums who bring their baby strollers to the park, but when her recently-hired assistant secretly starts exacting revenge, Audrey's perfect world erupts into madness.

programme.title: Harry and Meghan: Escaping the Palace
programme.desc: The couple decide to step back from the duties of the British monarchy following the birth of their son Archie.

programme.title: Abducted at an HBCU
programme.desc: College counsellor Ellen becomes concerned when Shannon, a student who's struggling financially, suddenly stops going to classes.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: An attorney who lived in LA during the Night Stalker's murder spree attempts to clear the name of an inmate who she believes was wrongly accused of the crimes.

programme.title: Bury The Past
programme.desc: Alice was married to a deranged, abusive man: a police officer who was regarded as a pillar of the community, but was secretly a monster.

programme.title: Girl in the Box
programme.desc: In 1977, Colleen Stan doesn't think twice when she hitchhikes and is picked up by young couple Cameron and Janice Hooker. But the life she knows is ripped away when they abduct her.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorius: Blade Runner Killer
programme.desc: The true story of the sprint runner and his rise to fame as a Paralympian gold medallist. It all shattered one evening when four bullets were fired and his beautiful girlfriend's life was taken.

programme.title: Expecting Amish
programme.desc: When an eventful Rumspringa leads to an unintended pregnancy, Amish teen Hannah must choose between returning to faith and family or beginning a new life elsewhere.

programme.title: Liz & Dick
programme.desc: A chronicle of the fiery, legendary, on-again off-again romance between Hollywood stars Elizabeth Taylor and Richard Burton.

programme.sub-title: Live Full Of Faith Pt 4 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.sub-title: Say Goodbye to the Grand Duchess of Greed Part 1
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn! One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner his mum! She knows more about shopping than solving crime.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: The town prepares for the Governor's black-tie ball, while still reeling from true intentions of Union City Holdings, Lucas decides to try to sway the Governor to their side.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: LIFE Church - Online
programme.desc: Join Senior Pastors Paul and Maree de Jong along with the LIFE Team for their Sunday service experience, pre-recorded from their Central Campus in Auckland, New Zealand.

programme.title: Day of Discovery
programme.desc: This weekly, documentary-style series offers a view of current and historical events, biblical prophecy, and contemporary issues of importance to those of the Christian faith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God gives us the power of the Holy Spirit to live beyond our feelings and experience more joy in life. Learn how to follow His lead.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as Songs of Praise travels throughout Britain and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: An Interview with God
programme.desc: An up-and-coming journalist finds his world and faith increasingly challenged when he's granted the interview of a lifetime - with someone who claims to be God.

programme.title: Red Dust Challenge
programme.desc: A team of experienced disaster response volunteers, powered by mateship and determination, ride bicycles across the Simpson Desert to raise money for Australian charity Global Care, while lockdowns threaten to derail their adventure.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Torchlighters: Heroes of the Faith
programme.desc: In AD 203, Perpetua is charged with converting to Christianity and is sent to prison. But her freedom can be secured. All she has to do is offer one pinch of incense in honour to the Roman gods.

programme.title: Ancestors: New Testament
programme.desc: Discover how similar we are to our faith ancestors from. Hilarious animations reveal more about Bible heroes, villains, and everyday folks that God selected to do extraordinary things.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: This inspiring and uplifting program facilitates conversations to empower viewers to make a positive impact in their own circles of influence.

programme.title: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: Grieving over the untimely loss of his family and in a dissociative state, an aimlessly-wandering Jewish man is rescued by another family who help him find his way back to happiness again.

programme.title: Vindication
programme.desc: An episodic crime drama that follows the investigative work of Detective Gary Travis. New characters, new crimes, hard-hitting issues, spiritual revelations, surprising new romances and shocking new rivalries.

programme.title: Dream: Live with Purpose, Learn to Dream
programme.desc: Dream is a documentary series featuring the stories of diverse people from around the globe, who found purpose when they embraced their God-given dream.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.desc: A seven-week series looking at the discipleship lessons that are found in Jesus' letters to the seven churches from the book of Revelation.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Stay On Grace Ground And Experience True Life Pt 1 of 5
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: God gives us the power of the Holy Spirit to live beyond our feelings and experience more joy in life. Learn how to follow His lead.

programme.title: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: Grieving over the untimely loss of his family and in a dissociative state, an aimlessly-wandering Jewish man is rescued by another family who help him find his way back to happiness again.

programme.title: Sgt Stubby: An Unlikely Hero
programme.desc: The true story of the most decorated dog in American military history - Sergeant Stubby - and the enduring bonds he forged with his brothers-in-arms in the trenches of World War I.

programme.title: Mosley
programme.desc: A species of creatures known as 'thoriphants' rebel against their life of servitude and embark on a treacherous journey to find the fabled city of Uprights.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Liz & Dick
programme.desc: A chronicle of the fiery, legendary, on-again off-again romance between Hollywood stars Elizabeth Taylor and Richard Burton.

programme.title: The Inherited
programme.desc: Eve's happily-ever-after with the man of her dreams becomes a waking nightmare after they move into the house willed to him by his first wife, who died under horrific circumstances.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend from college working aboard a luxury yacht in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust a hiking guide to take them on an off trail adventure.

programme.title: My Professor's Guide to Murder
programme.desc: Ashley is a creative writing graduate student who is one thesis away from graduating. Miles Blake, a celebrity murder mystery writer comes to her university to teach. She gets assigned to be his TA.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant
programme.desc: A single mum takes her daughter's advice and lets out her spare room to a student in need. But the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Ann Rule's Sleeping With Danger
programme.desc: Paul Carter was like a knight in shining armour when he met flight attendant Grace Tanner and swept her into a passionate love affair. But her dream man quickly became her nightmare.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer: Melanie McGuire Story
programme.desc: A dramatisation of the romance and marriage of the McGuires, the 2004 murder of Bill, investigation and subsequent trial of Melanie, who dismembered and disposed of her husband's body in suitcases.

programme.title: Surviving The Sleepover
programme.desc: Outspoken teenager Hannah goes to a sleepover at a popular girl's house, not realising she was only invited to be the victim of a prank.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: The Killer Is Calling
programme.desc: When a mysterious killer targets a remote island town, a veteran 911 operator tries to uncover his motives and save her community, one emergency call at a time.

programme.title: Flowers in the Attic
programme.desc: After the death of their father, the four Dollanganger children are convinced by their mother to stay hidden in the attic of their grandparents' mansion so she can reclaim the family fortune.

programme.title: Jingle Belle
programme.desc: High school sweethearts Isabelle and Mike once rocked the annual Christmas Pageant. Years later, when Isabelle returns home, she is shocked to learn that Mike now directs the show.

programme.title: Ann Rule's A Murder To Remember
programme.desc: Javier and Robin Rivera are celebrating their one-year anniversary on a camping trip. But when Javier ends up dead, Robin finds herself alone in the rough wilderness.

programme.title: Hunt for the Labyrinth Killer
programme.desc: An ace ADA works with a driven cop to catch Daedalus, a serial killer infamous for luring his victims to their deaths with elaborate traps.

programme.title: Menendez: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Erik and Lyle Menendez were educated, nice boys from sunny Beverly Hills, California. So when their parents were found shot dead in their home, no one could figure out why they did it.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: Sara, a vibrant teen, was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father. But before she could even blow out the candles, her world became extremely dark.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear

programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the lives of the very first Christians. Using the Book of Acts, he travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places, and events that launched the faith.

programme.title: The Unseen Realm
programme.desc: Corbin Bernsen hosts this fascinating look at the unseen realm of the Bible and casts a light on the strange and enigmatic plane of the supernatural that lies within the pages of Scripture.

programme.title: Jesus the Game Changer
programme.desc: Jesus taught that each individual had inherent value - they were loved by God, & worthy of love and attention from other people. Jesus viewed people as not only members of families or communities but as being individuals of worth.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Angkor Wat - A Message in Stone
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Stay On Grace Ground And Experience True Life Pt 2 of 5
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Atheism cannot account for love. Without God, there can be no love.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Want to be able to live beyond your feelings and experience more joy in life? Learn how the Holy Spirit can help you!

programme.title: 90 Minutes In Heaven
programme.desc: A man involved in a horrific car crash is pronounced dead, only to come back to life an hour and a half later, claiming to have seen Heaven.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham, Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California who toured in Australia in 2012.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.sub-title: Leading to Success in a Changing World
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Walking In Faith/The Companion of Faith
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK Theologian, Cambridge Scholar, Pastor and Bible Teacher David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Legacy
programme.desc: This is the third instalment of the enchanting trilogy about three college friends - Tracy, Avery and Emma - who share a 19th century wedding veil said to bring whoever possesses it true love.

programme.title: Girl in the Basement
programme.desc: Sara, a vibrant teen, was looking forward to her 18th birthday so she could move away from her controlling father. But before she could even blow out the candles, her world became extremely dark.

programme.title: One Night Stand Murder
programme.desc: Alyssa wakes up in a home that's not hers and discovers a dead body. With no memory of how she got there and no idea of who the body belongs to, Alyssa tries to piece together what happened.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: Hider in My House
programme.desc: As Molly Bachman settles into the apartment of her dreams, she discovers a hidden entrance to another apartment within the walls.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, and her drunken Grandpere Jack.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Heaven
programme.desc: Of all the poor people living in 'the willies', the foothills of the mountains of West Virginia, the Casteels were considered lowest.

programme.title: Expecting Amish
programme.desc: When an eventful Rumspringa leads to an unintended pregnancy, Amish teen Hannah must choose between returning to faith and family or beginning a new life elsewhere.

programme.title: Wedding Planner Mystery
programme.desc: A wedding planner turns amateur sleuth when she investigates a suspicious death and the kidnapping of a bride.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: A woman stumbles into the middle of a kidnapping while stranded at a small-town airport on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange as his fascination with her turns into obsession.

programme.title: Petals on the Wind
programme.desc: A decade after Cathy, Christopher, and Carrie escaped from their grandparents' attic, the family attempt to put their past behind them, but soon discover certain secrets can't be left behind.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Cari Farver
programme.desc: Based on actual events. When his girlfriend, Cari, starts sending him demanding messages Dave decides to break it off. Shortly after, Cari disappears and the police make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Husband, Wife and Their Lover
programme.desc: A sexually charged thriller about Franklin and Bridget, a married couple in trouble.

programme.title: To Have and to Hold
programme.desc: Alice, who still can't believe her high school crush, the dashing, wealthy, and successful Joe, would choose to marry her, willingly allows him to mould her into his ideal socialite wife.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: Big Driver
programme.desc: A mystery writer stranded on a stretch of New England road is offered assistance by another driver. She quickly discovers her saviour is actually her assailant - and a killer.

programme.desc: As her childhood sweetheart's bride, Heaven would savour now the love she had sought for so long. Free from her father's clutches, she would live again in her backwoods town.

programme.title: My Landlord Wants Me Dead
